name: Paris
description: A city known for art, museums, historical landmarks like the Eiffel Tower, and charming cafes.

name: Bali
description: A tropical paradise with beaches, rice terraces, temples, and relaxing vibes.

name: Singapore
description: A luxury destination with skyscrapers, shopping malls, desert adventures, and modern attractions.

name: Swiss Alps
description: Snowy mountains, skiing, breathtaking views, and peaceful nature.

name: Rome
description: Ancient history, ruins, delicious food, and iconic landmarks like the Colosseum.

name: Maldives
description: Luxury overwater villas, crystal-clear water, and relaxing beach vibes.

name: New York
description: A fast-paced city with skyscrapers, nightlife, shopping, and diverse culture.

name: Cappadocia
description: Famous for hot air balloons, unique rock formations, and magical landscapes.

name: Petra
description: Ancient rock-carved city in the desert, full of history and cultural significance.

name: Iceland
description: Volcanoes, glaciers, waterfalls, and northern lights in a dramatic natural landscape.
